TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Cipawkan, title = Cipawkan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cipawkan} }

S.FORM: == satangahan == niyazu' nu Cipawkan i Kalingku. u sulit nu Hulam: ŚźČŚĮ∂ŚĻ≤/Śĺ∑ŚģČťÉ®ŤźĹ Cipawkan i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Cipawkan. u kasalumaluma' nu Cipawkan sa, 2,448 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 6,662 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,051 ku tademaw, pakalatu 16%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5,611 ku tademaw, pakalatu 84%. u kasabinacadan, Amis 13%, Truku 2%, zumazuma 0.5%. duut ku Pangcah(Amis) itini, caayka duut kuzuma a tademaw. malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan == nijazu Ē~ ° nu ¶ipawkan i kar~…ĺiŇčku. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***/**** ¶ipawkan i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu ¶ipawkan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ¶ipawkan sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, amis **%, truku *%, zumazuma *.*%. duut ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis) itini, ¶aajka duut kuzuma a tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == satangahan == niyazu' nu Cipawkan i Kalingku. u sulit nu Hulam: ŚźČŚĮ∂ŚĻ≤/Śĺ∑ŚģČťÉ®ŤźĹ Cipawkan i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Cipawkan. u kasalumaluma' nu Cipawkan sa, 2,448 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 6,662 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,051 ku tademaw, pakalatu 16%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5,611 ku tademaw, pakalatu 84%. u kasabinacadan, Amis 13%, Truku 2%, zumazuma 0.5%. duut ku Pangcah(Amis) itini, caayka duut kuzuma a tademaw. malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan == nijazu Ē~ ° nu ¶ipawkan i kar~…ĺiŇčku. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***/**** ¶ipawkan i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu ¶ipawkan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ¶ipawkan sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, amis **%, truku *%, zumazuma *.*%. duut ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis) itini, ¶aajka duut kuzuma a tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
